name: Tag
description: Represents a tag in the Factory I/O simulation scene. Tags correspond to I/O signals mapped to PLC addresses.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the tag as defined in the Factory I/O scene.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Globally unique identifier for the tag. Stable across sessions.

fields.name: address
fields.description: PLC address mapped to this tag.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Data type of the tag value. Determines valid value range and encoding.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Direction of the tag from the controller perspective. Input = sensor data read by controller; Output = actuator command written by controller.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Current live value of the tag in the simulation.

fields.name: openCircuit
fields.description: True if the tag has an always-off (open circuit) fault injected.

fields.name: shortCircuit
fields.description: True if the tag has an always-on (short circuit) fault injected.

fields.name: isForced
fields.description: True if the tag value is currently overridden by a forced value.

fields.name: forcedValue
fields.description: The value the tag is held at when isForced is true.
